sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Reserved candidate from place-sorrento-01 shortlist (candidate B). Sorrento Back Beach rock pools at 5637x3855, CC-BY-SA. The place-sorrento-01 hero uses the CC0 morning coastal scene, so this back beach image is free for the experience page. Anti-twinning preserved.

candidates.place: Sorrento Back Beach — rock pools and ocean beach
candidates.sourcingAgentNote: Highest-resolution Sorrento candidate at 5637px. Shows distinctive back beach with rock pools — unmistakably Sorrento. Taken Nov 2019. Editorially strong. Distinct from place-sorrento-01 selected candidate (CC0 morning coastal scene). SA licence flag.

editorActionsRequested.question: Single candidate but high quality and no twinning conflict.
